title: eragrostis perennans
intro: Eragrostis perennans, also known as Blue Grama Grass, is a perennial grass native to the grasslands of North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant's health benefits are believed to include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant support. Eragrostis perennans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as dried and powdered for use in supplements and other medicinal products.
